articles.title: Boarshaw Community Primary School to Reopen on 3 September 2026
articles.excerpt: Boarshaw Community Primary School is currently on summer holidays and will reopen for pupils on Thursday 3 September 2026. The school has confirmed these dates through verified school-published term dates. The term dates include official school INSET, CPD, or closure days where listed. articles.content_html:
Boarshaw Community Primary School is currently on summer holidays and will reopen for pupils on Thursday 3 September 2026. The school has confirmed these dates through verified school-published term dates.

The term dates include official school INSET, CPD, or closure days where listed. It is advisable for parents and guardians to check with the school directly before making any plans, as dates may change.

The 2026/27 term dates have been verified by the school’s team, ensuring accuracy for the upcoming academic year. Parents can also compare these dates with Rochdale council's published term dates for additional context.

For further information, including specific INSET days, families are encouraged to consult the school’s official communications.
articles.legal_disclaimer: This article was compiled from identified public sources and may be updated when further verified information becomes available.
articles.right_to_reply: Anyone directly affected may request a correction or right of reply by emailing news@rochdaledaily.co.uk.
